rationale: Both papers are tightly aligned on the core mechanism question behind the endowment effect (loss aversion vs alternative drivers), and the citing paper explicitly positions itself against the dominant pain-of-losing account while developing an alternative mechanism. The cited paper is a theory/commentary piece on when losses loom larger than gains, proposing moderators (emotional attachment, cognitive perspective) and boundary conditions, so it is plausibly a substantive theoretical reference rather than a generic mention.
